title: Nirvana Island: The Last 47 Days
original_title: 彼岸島 デラックス
overview: The movie depicts the confrontation between younger brother Akira Miyamoto (Shunya Shiraishi) and older brother Atsushi Miyamoto (Ryohei Suzuki) on Higanjima.
